productDisplayName: Fila Men New Percorso Tech Grey Casual Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila New Percorso Tech is a true city trainer that comes in a low profile silhouette and is packed with features, making it a great buy.UpperLeather upper with mesh panels on the midfoot for absolute breathable comfortLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticPull loop for ease on/off and to hang the shoes from a backpackMidsoleMoulded midsole for comfort OutsoleTPR outsole with suction and terraced lugs for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
